title: selaginella wolfii
intro: Selaginella wolfii, also known as Wolf's Spikemoss, is a species of evergreen spikemoss native to China. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial activities. The health benefits of Selaginella wolfii include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and used to make teas or infusions, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
